  FreeBSD positron 10.1-RELEASE-p10 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p10 #0: Wed May 13 06:54:13 UTC 2015     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64


src.conf does not exist

make.conf:

  # added by use.perl 2013-07-21 17:02:00
  PERL_VERSION=5.12.5
  WITH_PKGNG=YES


Interesting point there with the PERL_VERSION, that has since been updated quite a few times.
